evals.prompt: Refactor the `formatZodErrors` function in the format package — rename it to `formatValidationErrors` across the entire codebase and update all consumers
evals.expected_output: All references to formatZodErrors renamed to formatValidationErrors, typecheck passes, tests pass, full refactoring report with diffs and import impact

assertions.text: No remaining references to formatZodErrors in the codebase (excluding report/docs)
pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
pnpm test passes after the refactoring
Report contains a table listing changed files with change type and line counts
Report contains diff blocks showing before/after for each changed file
Each changed file has a specific rationale explaining why it changed
Report contains before/after verification table showing typecheck and test results
Report lists which consumers import the changed export
Report includes a draft conventional commit message

evals.prompt: The serialize.ts file in format package has both serialize and deserialize logic. Split it into separate serialize.ts and deserialize.ts modules, update the barrel export in index.ts
evals.expected_output: Two focused files instead of one, all imports updated, no dead code, typecheck and tests pass, report shows file additions and modifications

assertions.text: A new deserialize.ts file was created in the format package
serialize.ts no longer contains deserialize function definitions
index.ts re-exports from both serialize.ts and deserialize.ts
pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
pnpm test passes after the refactoring
Report contains a table listing changed files with added/modified markers
Report includes a breaking changes section
Report includes before/after complexity comparison

evals.prompt: Extract the transform application logic from the engine into a cleaner API — the applyTransform function is doing too much, break it into smaller composable pieces
evals.expected_output: applyTransform decomposed into focused functions, existing tests still pass, complexity delta shows improvement, report includes rationale for each extraction

assertions.text: At least 2 new focused functions were extracted from applyTransform
pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
pnpm test passes after the refactoring
Report contains diff blocks for changed files
Each extraction has a specific rationale explaining why
Report shows max function length decreased
Report includes a dead code check section
